Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microscopes can see video on a laserdisc 574 upvotes, 76 comments
  2. FrameBook 496 upvotes, 82 comments
  3. Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents 745 upvotes, 171 comments
  4. Kuwaiti F/A-18's Triple Friendly Fire Shootdown Gets Stranger by the Day 69 upvotes, 12 comments
  5. PCB devboard the size of a USB-C plug 244 upvotes, 59 comments
  6. Is legal the same as legitimate: AI reimplementation and the erosion of copyleft 27 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. Jolla on track to ship new phone with Sailfish OS, user-replaceable battery 16 upvotes, 1 comments
  8. Flash media longevity testing – 6 years later 45 upvotes, 9 comments
  9. Fontcrafter: Turn Your Handwriting into a Real Font 298 upvotes, 97 comments
  10. Every single board computer I tested in 2025 208 upvotes, 65 comments
  11. Algebraic topology: knots links and braids 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  12. FreeBSD Capsicum vs. Linux Seccomp Process Sandboxing 65 upvotes, 18 comments
  13. Anthropic investors grow frustrated with CEO after feds ban AI startup 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  14. Segagaga Has Been Translated into English 70 upvotes, 22 comments
  15. The Window Chrome of Our Discontent 100 upvotes, 37 comments
  16. Reverse-engineering the UniFi inform protocol 77 upvotes, 28 comments
  17. Restoring a Sun SPARCstation IPX Part 1: PSU and Nvram 21 upvotes, 5 comments
  18. Revealed: UK's multibillion AI drive is built on 'phantom investments' 42 upvotes, 15 comments
  19. Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025) 570 upvotes, 326 comments
  20. Show HN: VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI-Assisted Developer 66 upvotes, 30 comments
  21. FFmpeg at Meta: Media Processing at Scale 125 upvotes, 66 comments
  22. The Finger and the Moon 15 upvotes, 4 comments
  23. Unlocking Python's Cores:Energy Implications of Removing the GIL 86 upvotes, 52 comments
  24. US Court of Appeals: TOS may be updated by email, use can imply consent [pdf] 437 upvotes, 336 comments
  25. No leap second will be introduced at the end of June 2026 31 upvotes, 18 comments
  26. Lazy JWT Key Rotation in .NET: Redis-Powered JWKS That Just Works 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. The engine of Germany's wealth is blocking its future 145 upvotes, 163 comments
  28. Grammarly is offering ‘expert’ AI reviews from famous dead and living writers 64 upvotes, 81 comments
  29. Ask HN: Can I repurpose a Bluetooth voice remote as input device for a PC? 8 upvotes, 7 comments
